meta.title: UK Crypto Tax Compliance Index
meta.description: Verified data on UK cryptoasset ownership levels and the CARF reporting timeline. All figures cited to primary sources. Updated annually on FCA wave publication.
meta.methodology: Ownership figures from FCA Cryptoassets Consumer Research (annual YouGov omnibus, nationally representative). CARF dates from HMRC guidance. CGT parameters from gov.uk capital-gains-tax pages. No modelled tax gap figures are published here: HMRC does not publish a crypto-specific tax gap, so no estimate is stated.

ownership.note: Wave 5, YouGov survey of 2,199 UK adults, nationally representative. Published November 2024, corrected March 2025. Wave 6 (2025) published; see source for latest figure.
ownership.awarenessLabel: 93% of UK adults have heard of cryptoassets

carfTimeline.annualDeadlineThereafter: 31 May each year covering prior calendar year
carfTimeline.description: UK cryptoasset reporting entities must collect user and transaction data from 1 January 2026. The first report covering the 2026 calendar year must be submitted to HMRC between 1 January 2027 and 31 May 2027. Annual reports are due by 31 May each year thereafter.

cgtParameters.note: 18% applies only on the portion of the gain within the taxpayer's remaining basic-rate income tax band; 24% applies above that threshold and for higher/additional-rate taxpayers on the full gain.

disclosureWindows.note: Number of past tax years HMRC may assess depends on taxpayer behaviour. Voluntary unprompted disclosure secures the lowest applicable penalty percentage.
